sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25188" key="dia/lusos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-λῡσος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n25188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">releaser,</tr_> coined as expl. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Διόνυσος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
